message.content: I have an error in my TypeScript build: cannot find module react.

content.text: The error means react is not installed. Run: npm install react react-dom @types/react @types/react-dom. After that your TypeScript build should find the module. This resolves the cannot find module error.

message.content: Still getting an error: TS2307 cannot find module react.

content.text: Also check tsconfig.json — set moduleResolution to bundler or node16. The solution: add 'moduleResolution': 'bundler' to compilerOptions. Fixed the TS2307 error completely.
